  3. City Centre East

District

City Centre East

City Centre East stretches from the Schlossplatz to the main station. Friedrichsplatz, the Natural History Museum, the Baden State Theatre and the café culture along Karl-Friedrich-Strasse give this district its character.

UrbanTheatreMuseums
City Centre East

Attractions in City Centre East

Museum

City Centre East

State Museum of Natural History

One of the largest natural history museums in Germany. A vivarium with live animals, dinosaur skeletons and a hall of minerals.

from 6 EUR
Modern
Free

City Centre East

Baden State Theatre

A three-division house with opera, drama and ballet on Hermann-Levi-Platz. One of the leading theatres in southern Germany.

Free entry
Park

City Centre East

Karlsruhe Zoological City Garden

A zoo right by the main station, merged with the city garden. One of the most beautiful zoo grounds in Germany.

from 12 EUR
Park
Free

City Centre East

City Garden

An English landscape park by the main station, combined with the zoo. Gondoletta boat rides and animal enclosures.

Free entry

Restaurants in City Centre East

Brauhaus Kuehler Krug
Baden cuisine
€€

City Centre East

Brauhaus Kuehler Krug

Brewpub in the Stadtgarten with a beer garden under old trees. A summer classic for Karlsruhe.
Restaurant Anders
Modern
€€€

City Centre East

Restaurant Anders

Refined modern cuisine with a Karlsruhe connection. Seasonal, regional and creative.
Ristorante Lehners
Italian
€€

City Centre East

Ristorante Lehners

A classic Italian restaurant with wood-fired pizza and handmade pasta dishes.
Sakai Sushi
Japanese
€€€

City Centre East

Sakai Sushi

Premium sushi in Karlsruhe with fresh fish and classic Japanese presentation.
Mezzo Mezzo
Mediterranean
€€

City Centre East

Mezzo Mezzo

Mediterranean-Turkish cuisine with mezze platters and grilled fish. A lively atmosphere.
Cafe Bleu
Cafe
€€

City Centre East

Cafe Bleu

A classic cafe with a breakfast menu, bistro lunch and a cosy atmosphere.
Eigelb
Bistro
€€

City Centre East

Eigelb

A bistro with a creative lunch menu, organic ingredients and a vegetarian-vegan focus.

Touren & Tickets · GetYourGuide

Erlebnisse in der Karlsruher Innenstadt-Ost

Staatstheater, Naturkundemuseum und die Nähe zum Zoo machen die Innenstadt-Ost zu einem kulturreichen Bezirk – entdecke passende Touren und Aktivitäten.

* Affiliate — Buchung laeuft ueber GetYourGuide. Bei Buchung ueber diese Links erhalten wir eine Provision, fuer dich entstehen keine Mehrkosten.
